General.Name: Desun Re Invest Svcs Grp Co
General.Description: Desun Real Estate Investment Services Group Co., Ltd. provides integrated property management services in China. It operates through Property Services; Asset Operation Service; and Investment and Development segments. The company manages a portfolio of residential properties and non-residential properties, as well as provides value-added services. It also provides commercial operation, commercial property management, and other related services; e-commerce live streaming services; home furnishing, home decoration, and refurbishment services; and office building sublease and co-operative services. In addition, the company engages in the sale of carparks; and provision of engineering construction management services. Desun Real Estate Investment Services Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China. Desun Real Estate Investment Services Group Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Sky Donna Holding Limited.
General.Address: No. 1480 North Section of Tianfu Avenue, Chengdu, China
